notes: This file stores historical service periods and role/designation history separately from the current personnel directory and the current assignment layer.
Use statement-of-service or equivalent official assignment-history documents as source input whenever available.
Do not overwrite currentAssignments or current profile designations automatically when a service-history document disagrees with a monthly workbook; keep the difference visible for verification.
Keep raw designation wording per period and normalize only when the meaning is explicit in the same document or confirmed by another already-inspected source.
Current service-history period includes Assessor and Chief, Rescue Unit.

The April 2026 monthly workbook current-profile record for this person still lists Fire Prevention Unit Staff and Customer Relations Officer, so current-role display should remain verification-aware until the preferred source is chosen.
